description: Reorganise bottom navigation: Home, Plan, Progress, Profile. Replace Log tab with Plan (daily actionable view). Replace Workouts tab with Progress (insights/trends). Keep FAB for quick logging.

userStories.title: Create ProgressScreen for the new Progress tab
acceptanceCriteria: Create lib/features/insights/presentation/progress_tab_screen.dart
Screen is a ConsumerStatefulWidget that takes profileId
Shows in order: Recovery Trend card (7-day sparkline), VO2 Max card (value + chart + forecast), Training Load card (4-week bars), Sleep Quality card (7/14 day averages), AI Narrative card
Uses existing providers: insightsProvider, todayRecoveryScoreProvider
Recovery trend shows score 0-100 with color coding and sparkline
VO2 max shows current value, fitness classification, chart area
Training load shows weekly AU with trend percentage
Sleep quality shows 7-day and 14-day averages with trend direction
AI narrative card shows cached insight with sparkle icon
All cards use AppColors and dark theme styling (surfaceContainerHigh, 16dp radius)
Loading state shows shimmer, error state shows inline message
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: This screen consolidates what was on the insights_dashboard_screen. Use the same providers but in a simpler layout focused on trends. Header: 'Progress' title + 'Your health trends over time' subtitle.

userStories.title: Redesign DailyViewScreen as Plan tab with meals, workout, supplements, habits
acceptanceCriteria: Read lib/features/daily_view/presentation/daily_view_screen.dart

Redesign to show: date selector at top, morning check-in card, meal plan slots (breakfast/lunch/dinner/snack from mealPlanProvider), workout plan card (today's scheduled workout with Start button), supplement schedule (from supplementsProvider), habits checklist (from habitProvider with toggles)
Morning check-in card shows status: 'Tap to start' if not done, 'Completed' if done today
Tapping check-in navigates to /daily-coach/checkin
Meal plan shows meal type, name, and calories per slot
If no meal plan, show 'Generate plan' button
Workout card shows workout name, duration, exercise count, and Start button -> /workouts/log/:id
If no workout scheduled, show 'Plan a workout' link -> /workouts
Supplements show checkbox list with time-of-day labels
Habits show toggle checkboxes with streak counts
All cards use AppColors, 20dp horizontal padding, 16dp border radius
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: The current DailyViewScreen already has some of this. Keep the date selector and dailyViewProvider. Add mealPlanProvider, workoutProvider/todayWorkoutsProvider, supplementsProvider imports. Workout data comes from existing providers.

userStories.title: Update bottom navigation tabs and router branches
acceptanceCriteria: Read lib/shared/core/router/scaffold_with_bottom_nav.dart
Read lib/shared/core/router/app_router.dart
Change 4 tabs to: Home (house icon), Plan (calendar_today icon), Progress (trending_up icon), Profile (person icon)
Update StatefulShellRoute branches: Branch 0 = Dashboard (/), Branch 1 = Plan (/plan), Branch 2 = Progress (/progress), Branch 3 = Profile (/profile)
Branch 1 renders the redesigned DailyViewScreen (now Plan)
Branch 2 renders the new ProgressScreen
Move workout child routes from Branch 2 into Branch 0 (dashboard) so workouts are accessible via push from Plan tab and module grid
Update all navigation references: /daily-view -> /plan
FAB remains at endFloat position on all tabs
All existing deep links and routes must still work
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: The key change is swapping branch 1 (daily-view) and branch 2 (workouts). Workout routes become children of dashboard (push routes). Plan and Progress become the tab screens. Update bottomNavigationBar items labels and icons.

userStories.title: Remove workouts from module grid and update references
acceptanceCriteria: Read lib/shared/core/modules/module_metadata.dart
Set workouts module defaultEnabled to false since it now has prominence in Plan tab
Update discover_quick_access_grid.dart: replace Workouts tile with Insights tile pointing to /progress
Update any hardcoded references to /daily-view to use /plan instead
Verify module grid shows: Meals, Supplements, Health, Reminders, Goals, Bloodwork, Habits (7 tiles)
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: Workouts are accessible from Plan tab workout card and from pushing /workouts from anywhere. They don't need a module grid tile anymore. The Discover grid should point to /progress for the insights/progress tile.
